Analysts using technical analysis have identified a potential breakout towards the $0.13 resistance level, contingent upon the current support remaining above $0.10.

data.title: Aptiv Celebrates NASA’s Successful Artemis II Mission
data.description: VxWorks, a crucial software system developed by a Switzerland-based company, has been instrumental in NASA's plans for humanity's return to the moon. This technology plays a critical role in ensuring the success of this mission, which is of immense significance to both NASA and humanity at large. NASA's upcoming mission to the moon heavily relies on VxWorks to ensure its success and safety. This development highlights the importance of this software system in enabling crucial space exploration endeavors.

data.title: The April 2026 Global Sources Hong Kong Show Phase I Opens Today
data.description: Today, the April 2026 Global Sources Hong Kong Show Phase I kicked off at AsiaWorld-Expo, scheduled from April 11 to 14. This event signifies a shift in trade strategies, with scenario-based sourcing reshaping the supply chain logic amidst global instability. With three significant international companies participating, the show aims to address uncertainties by diversifying Asia's supply chain.

data.title: Plug Power Secures Largest Electrolyzer Projects To-Date
data.description: Shares of Plug Power Inc. (NASDAQ: PLUG) are experiencing a decline in the premarket session on Thursday. The company has secured a significant contract to supply a 275 MW GenEco PEM electrolyzer system for Hy2gen Canada's "Courant" project. This contract involves a Front-End Engineering Design (FEED) for one of the largest electrolyzer projects to date, aimed at supporting the production of low-carbon ammonia using Canada's hydroelectric resources. Hy2gen is developing the Courant project to become one of North America's largest low-carbon ammonium nitrate facilities, catering to the mining industry in Québec, Central and Eastern Canada, and beyond. Plug Power is responsible for providing advanced engineering and system design services to integrate electrolyzers, optimize plant layout, and improve overall performance. The company's PEM electrolyzer technology is known for its high reliability, efficiency, and operational flexibility. This news coincides with a broader market downturn, putting additional pressure on Plug Power's stock performance.

data.title: Míla Holding hf. announces Consolidated Condensed Annual Financial Statements for the year ended 31 December 2025
data.description: Míla Holding hf. has released its Consolidated Condensed Annual Financial Statements for the fiscal year that concluded on December 31, 2025. This report provides a comprehensive overview of the company's financial performance, including key figures such as revenue, expenses, profits, and assets. Stakeholders and analysts can use this information to assess the company's financial health and make informed decisions. The financial statements offer a detailed account of Míla Holding's operations and serve as a valuable tool for evaluating its overall business performance in the past year.

data.title: Magna Announces Sale of Its Lighting and Rooftop Systems Businesses
data.description: In Aurora, Ontario on April 9, 2026, Magna International Inc. disclosed plans to sell off its Lighting business through two distinct deals and its Rooftop Systems business through a third transaction. The company, listed on the TSX under MG and NYSE under MGA, has finalized agreements for the divestiture, marking significant strategic moves.

data.title: Ready Capital Corporation releases business update with key figures.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global market for electric vehicles (EVs) is experiencing significant growth, with sales surpassing 3.2 million units in 2020. This represents a 43% increase from the previous year. The surge in demand for EVs has been attributed to various factors, such as government incentives, advancing technology, and increasing environmental concerns. China remains the largest market for EVs, accounting for more than 1.2 million units sold in 2020. Europe follows closely behind, with sales exceeding 1 million units. The United States saw an increase in EV sales as well, with over 330,000 units sold last year. Analysts predict that this trend will continue in the coming years, driven by a greater emphasis on sustainability and the development of more affordable EV models.

data.title: USBC finishes selling off old sensor tech unit, no. of employees affected: undisclosed.
data.description: Over the past year, the number of confirmed COVID-19 cases worldwide has reached over 200 million, with more than 4 million reported deaths. The United States has the highest number of cases, exceeding 35 million, followed by India with over 31 million cases. Additionally, vaccination efforts have been ongoing, with over 3.5 billion doses administered globally. Despite progress, concerns remain about new variants and vaccine distribution disparities among countries. In response, efforts are being made to increase vaccine access and prevent further spread of the virus.

data.title: Insight Investments Renames and Rebrands as Insight Capital Solutions, and Announces Leadership Structure
data.description: Insight Investments Holdings, LLC disclosed on March 31, 2026, that it underwent a name change to Insight Capital Solutions, LLC. This alteration signifies the company's growth and venture into various equipment finance sectors and tech markets.

data.title: ReelTime's Annual Financials Reveal Major Capital Structure Improvements Designed to Protect Shareholder Value and Reduce Potential Dilution
data.description: With a focus on debt reduction, dilution discipline, and capital stewardship in the AI market dominated by Microsoft, NVIDIA, and Alphabet, ReelTime has successfully reduced or eliminated nearly 685 million potential shares. This achievement has led to a stable share count since July 2025. The company's strategic efforts in managing its shares align with the competition in the market, ensuring a strong position in the industry.
